title: sys.date_to_str(): cannot convert date
poc: CREATE TABLE voyages (departure_timestamp TIMESTAMP, departure_date DATE, departure_time TIME); SELECT departure_timestamp, date_to_str(departure_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS "date", time_to_str(departure_time, '%H:%M') AS "time", timestamp_to_str(departure_timestamp, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') AS "timestamp" FROM voyages LIMIT 3;
SELECT sys.date_to_str(departure_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS "date" FROM voyages LIMIT 3;
key_bug_features: sys.date_to_str() fails to convert date format
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE voyages (departure_timestamp TIMESTAMP, departure_date DATE, departure_time TIME, voyage_id INT PRIMARY KEY);
INSERT INTO voyages (departure_timestamp, departure_date, departure_time, voyage_id) VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 12:00:00', DATE '2023-10-01', TIME '12:00:00', 1);
INSERT INTO voyages (departure_timestamp, departure_date, departure_time, voyage_id) VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2023-10-02 15:30:00', DATE '2023-10-02', TIME '15:30:00', 2);
SELECT sys.date_to_str(departure_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS "date", sys.date_to_str(NULL, '%Y-%m-%d') AS "null_date" FROM voyages;
SELECT sys.date_to_str(departure_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS "date", sys.str_to_date(sys.date_to_str(departure_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), '%Y-%m-%d') AS "parsed_date" FROM voyages WHERE voyage_id = 1;
